description: T63 RSVPOrchestrator MUST call decrementAndCreate() as ONE atomic operation — no separate capacity-check then RSVP-write. Separate check + write creates a race window allowing over-booking. Duplicate (attendeeId, eventId) must return existing RSVP (SETNX semantic).
blockConditions: separate checkCapacity() then storeDocument() pattern used for RSVP
two-step RSVP creates race window allowing over-booking
passConditions: decrementAndCreate(attendeeId, eventId) called as single atomic operation
duplicate (attendeeId, eventId) returns existing RSVP without error (SETNX semantic)
resolution: decrementAndCreate(attendeeId, eventId) in one atomic call. Separate checkCapacity() then storeDocument() = BUILD_FAILURE (CF-802).

description: T64 WaitlistManager MUST process waitlist entries in FIFO order by joinTimestamp — NO hardcoded priority score override, NO VIP queue bypass. Any non-FIFO ordering (priority field, tenant-level override) violates CF-804 fairness constraint.
blockConditions: priority field present in waitlist record
VIP queue bypass implemented
non-FIFO ordering by priority score applied
passConditions: waitlist entries sorted by joinTimestamp ASC only
no priority field in waitlist record
FIFO order strictly enforced — no bypass
resolution: Sort by joinTimestamp ASC. No priority field in waitlist record. VIP bypass = BUILD_FAILURE (CF-804).

description: T65 CheckInProcessor MUST verify RSVP status === 'CONFIRMED' at ORDER 1 before recording check-in. PENDING/WAITLISTED RSVPs must return failure with CHECK_IN_NOT_PERMITTED. Skipping status check allows attendees without confirmed RSVPs to check in.
blockConditions: check-in recorded before RSVP status verified
PENDING or WAITLISTED RSVPs permitted to check in
status check absent from T65 path
passConditions: getStatus() called at ORDER 1 before check-in recording
status !== 'CONFIRMED' returns DataProcessResult.failure('CHECK_IN_NOT_PERMITTED')
check-in recorded only for CONFIRMED RSVPs
resolution: getStatus() at ORDER 1. status !== 'CONFIRMED' → DataProcessResult.failure('CHECK_IN_NOT_PERMITTED'). Check-in before status check = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T65 CheckInProcessor check-in window (1 hour before event start) is a MACHINE_CONSTANT — it MUST NOT be read from FREEDOM config. Check-in timing is an event integrity constraint, not a business preference. Tenants cannot extend or shorten the check-in window.
blockConditions: check-in window duration read from FREEDOM config
tenants able to extend or shorten check-in window via config
passConditions: CHECK_IN_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000 as const (machine constant)
check-in window not configurable via FREEDOM config
resolution: CHECK_IN_WINDOW_MS = 60 * 60 * 1000 as const. Reading from FREEDOM config = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T66 FeedbackWindowController MUST emit FeedbackWindowOpened ONLY in response to EventEnded event — NO timer trigger, NO scheduled cron, NO manual trigger. A timer-driven feedback window can open before an event ends, collecting premature feedback.
blockConditions: timer trigger used for FeedbackWindowOpened
cron job triggers feedback window opening
manual trigger used instead of EventEnded event
passConditions: @EventPattern('EventEnded') handler triggers FeedbackWindowOpened
no timer or scheduled trigger for feedback window opening
resolution: @EventPattern('EventEnded') handler triggers FeedbackWindowOpened. Timer/cron trigger = BUILD_FAILURE (CF-807).

description: T63 RSVPOrchestrator: xiigen-rsvps index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant RSVP reads are forbidden. Tenant context from AsyncLocalStorage only â€” never from event payload.
blockConditions: RSVP record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored RSVP record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: RSVP records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-rsvps reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

blockConditions: waitlist entry stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored waitlist entry
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Waitlist entry records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-waitlist-entries reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

blockConditions: check-in record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored check-in record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Check-in records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-checkins reads include tenantId predicate from ALS

blockConditions: feedback window record stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored feedback window record
tenantId sourced from request parameter instead of ALS
passConditions: Feedback window records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
All xiigen-feedback-windows reads include tenantId predicate from ALS
